title: Healfast, Healfast, Ye Hero Wounds
content:
'"Healfast, healfast, ye hero wounds;
        O knight, be quickly strong!
        Beloved strife
        For fame and life,
        Oh, tarry not too long!"'
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Louisa May Alcott delivers a powerful performance in "Healfast, Healfast, Ye Hero Wounds"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
